locator.quote: Untrained Gen-0 P&L is meaningless in either direction.

text: Untrained Gen-0 P&L is meaningless in either direction; the shakeout's strongly-positive means (transformer +£1723) are not architecture success.

locator.quote: Those numbers are 21 random policies acting on 4 days of

text: Those numbers are 21 random policies acting on 4 days of horse racing — the mean is just where the dice fell.

locator.quote: *sanity* signal (no NaNs, no 10^10 catastrophe) and nothing

text: A Gen-0 P&L is a sanity signal (no NaNs, no 10^10 catastrophe) and nothing more — the invariants check shapes and plumbing, not mean_pnl > 0.
